steps.title: Spot the size measurement
steps.content: The key signal is the area measurement. In the notes, only one detail quantifies Atitalaquía's dimensions: it covers roughly 63 km².

steps.title: Apply the measurement to the choices
steps.content: D is the only choice that supplies the area measurement from the notes. A, B, and C focus on public services, governmental structure, and comparative position instead. That matches choice D — D is correct.
